aal: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Afade.
ace: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Acehnese.
acne: noun. A skin condition, usually of the face, that is common in adolescents.
aecial: adjective. Of, pertaining to, or resembling an aecium.
ail: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Aimele.
ain: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Ainu.
ala: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Alago.
ale: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Aleut.
alec: noun. An anchovy or herring, especially pickled or dried.
alien: noun. A person, animal, plant, or other thing which is from outside the family, group, organization, or territory under consideration.
all: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Allar.
alliance: noun. The state of being allied.
ana: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Andaqui.
anal: adjective. Of, related to, intended for or involving the anus.
ane: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Xârâcùù.
ani: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Andi.
anil: noun. The indigo shrub; or the indigo dye obtained from the plant.
anile: adjective. Characteristic of a crone or a feeble old woman.
clan: noun. A group of people all descended from a common ancestor, in fact or belief, especially when the exact genealogies are not known.
clean: adjective. Free of dirt, filth, or impurities (extraneous matter); not dirty, filthy, or soiled.
clinal: adjective. Pertaining to beds or rest.
cline: noun. A gradation in a character or phenotype within a species, deme, or other systematic group.
ell: symbol. ISO 639-2 /T & ISO 639-3 language code for Greek.
ice: symbol. ISO 639-2 /B language code for Icelandic.
ileal: adjective. Of or pertaining to the ileum.
ill: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Iranun.
inlace: verb. To work in, as in lacework; to embellish with work resembling lace.
lac: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Lacandon.
lace: noun. A light fabric containing patterns of holes, usually built up from a single thread.
laic: noun. A layperson as opposed to a cleric, i.e. not a member of the clergy.
laical: adjective. Of or pertaining to a layperson, layman, laywoman, or laypeople, i.e. the laity in general.
lane: noun. A road, street, or similar thoroughfare.
lea: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Lega-Shabunda.
lean: verb. To incline, deviate, or bend, from a vertical position; to be in a position thus inclining or deviating.
liana: noun. A climbing woody vine, usually tropical.
lie: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Likila.
lienal: adjective. Of or pertaining to the spleen.
lilac: noun. A large shrub of the genus Syringa, especially Syringa vulgaris, bearing white, pale- pink, or purple flowers.
lin: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Lingala.
line: noun. A path through two or more points (compare ‘segment’); a continuous mark, including as made by a pen; any path, curved or straight.
lineal: adjective. Pertaining to lines; consisting of lines.
nae: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Naka'ela.
nail: noun. The thin, horny plate at the ends of fingers and toes on humans, chimpanzees and some other animals.
nil: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nila.
nill: verb. To be unwilling; will not (+ infinitive).
